description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a green lawn and bordered by a perimeter wall. The front features a driveway leading to a carport, landscaped with several trees and shrubs. The house has a flat roof and a minimalist design, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing access to the outdoor spaces. The rear of the property includes a spacious backyard, while the interior layout is open-plan with clearly defined living, dining, and bedroom areas. The exterior walls are primarily white, accented by sections of gray and brown, and the windows are arranged asymmetrically. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, emphasizing functionality and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, and a landscaped front yard with a driveway and carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, landscaped garden, and main entrance with large windows.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the long backyard, perimeter wall, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, flat roof, and the back facade with sliding doors and windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, trees, and the house's open-plan layout with visible room divisions.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, adjacent to a carport and landscaped garden, minimal decorative elements.
